case_title: CACH, LLC VS. ANDREW WHITNEY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITNEY, ANDREW AN INDIVIDUAL $7,267.57 PRINCIPAL, $1,075.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $809.93 INTEREST, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,437.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
